issue.title: Design: Lottie animated framework icons — replace unicode ★▮▲○ with animated icons
issue.description: Replace the current unicode characters (★▮▲○) representing the 4 personality frameworks with Lottie animated icons in the framework colors. Must be small, fast-loading, and feel premium. Spec the animation style, colors per framework, and loading behavior.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
